_comment: Hand-curated OpenAPI sources, merged into the openapi catalog by scripts/normalize.ts (buildOpenapi). Same shape as the apis.guru dump's `specs[]`, but kept here so entries survive an apis.guru refetch. `origin` is the provider's own canonical spec URL. Manual entries override an apis.guru entry with the same provider/service key.

specs.title: Cloudflare API
specs.description: The full Cloudflare API — manage DNS, Workers, R2, KV, Zero Trust, CDN/cache, WAF, and the rest of the Cloudflare platform.

specs.title: Smallest AI Atoms API
specs.description: The Atoms voice-agent platform API — create and manage AI voice agents, place outbound calls and campaigns, manage knowledge bases and phone numbers, and fetch call logs and analytics. Authenticated with a Bearer API key from the Atoms dashboard.

specs.title: Smallest AI Waves API
specs.description: The Waves text-to-speech API — Lightning v3.1 speech synthesis and streaming under https://api.smallest.ai/waves/v1. Speech-to-text is the separate Pulse entry. Authenticated with a Bearer API key.

specs.title: Smallest AI Pulse STT API
specs.description: The Pulse speech-to-text API — upload audio and receive transcriptions from the Pulse ASR model at https://api.smallest.ai/waves/v1/pulse. Authenticated with a Bearer API key.
